current_run.problem_name: Hidden XOR Product of Adjacent Pairs
current_run.description: Given an N-bit secret integer s, find s such that the function f(x) = (x & (x >> 1)) ^ s outputs 1 if the XOR sum of the products of adjacent bits of x is equal to a secret value, and 0 otherwise. Specifically, we are looking for a secret 's' such that f(x) = ((x_0 * x_1) ^ (x_1 * x_2) ^ ... ^ (x_{N-2} * x_{N-1})) == s. Note: bitwise operations are performed on the binary representation of x.
